programme.title: For Heaven's Sake

programme.title: For Heaven's Sake

Eventually, rumours began to circulate that Europe was prepared to recognise the Confederacy.

programme.desc: Documentary following two fans in search of their musical idol. American singer Sixto Rodriguez enjoyed a brief recording career in the 1970s before fading into obscurity. Bizarre stories of his death had circulated over the years, but two devotees plan to find out what really became of him.

programme.title: The Body Next Door
programme.desc: A look at how South Wales police focused their attention on Leigh Sabine, an elderly woman with a deceitful past who had recently died of cancer. As forensic officers raced to find evidence, the investigation uncovered a complex web of lies, leaving the village in turmoi

programme.title: The Body Next Door
programme.desc: Leigh Sabine becomes the prime suspect when DNA links her to the body wrapped in plastic, but she flees to New Zealand with her son in pursuit, leading to deadly consequences. As the investigation unfolds, DCI Gareth Morgan races against time to determine the identity of the victim, piecing together a dark narrative of jealousy, control, and ultimate betrayal.
